item.name: Workday Integration Retrieve benefit elections for a worker

request.name: Workday Integration Retrieve benefit elections for a worker

description.content: Returns the current benefit elections for the specified worker including coverage levels and dependents.

query.description: Maximum number of objects in a single response (default 20, maximum 100)
Zero-based index of the first object in a response collection

info.name: Workday Integration Workday Benefits Administration API

description.content:
API for managing employee benefits enrollment, eligibility, and plan administration. Supports programmatic access to benefits plans, enrollment events, and dependent management.

Contact Support:
 Name: Workday API Support
 Email: api-support@workday.com
